title: About Me
paragraphs: I am a Software Engineer with 3+ years of experience building scalable backend systems using Java, Spring Boot, and Microservices. I have designed and optimized systems that handle thousands of users with high availability and low latency.

In my recent work, I improved API reliability, reduced production errors, and increased system throughput by implementing asynchronous communication and event-driven architecture using Kafka. I focus on writing clean, maintainable code and building systems that scale.
I have strong experience in REST APIs, distributed systems, and databases like MySQL, MongoDB, and Redis. I also work with React to deliver complete end-to-end features when needed.

I take ownership of features from design to deployment and work closely with cross-functional teams to deliver reliable, production-ready solutions. I am passionate about solving real-world problems and continuously improving system performance.
